failures.change: Retry will upload the gzip-compressed VCF representation derived from the same archived input, reducing transfer size while preserving the VCF content after Galaxy decompression.
failures.message: Expanded 507 MB family VCF upload created a queued zero-byte Galaxy dataset and did not progress after repeated one-minute polling checks.

failures.change: The queued upload later completed in Galaxy; attempt 2 resumed from the completed expanded VCF dataset and completed the analysis.
failures.message: Compressed family VCF upload remained a queued zero-byte __DATA_FETCH__ Galaxy job through check 9, including extended 15-minute polling cadence; no stdout, stderr, or terminal failure message was available.

resolutions.resolution: Previous Galaxy upload queue blocker resolved when the queued datasets completed; attempt 2 produced the required Galaxy outputs and transformed CSV.
